# Who is DLO?

Personal website of Dennis Lo, IT consultant and software engineer.

## Primary Navigation

Token counts below are rough estimates based on page content, using the AEO guidance of character count divided by ~4.

- [About](/#about): Dennis Lo's summary, skills, client focus, and personal background (approx. 240 tokens).
- [Projects](/#projects): Selected work and product highlights, including newsletters and developer tooling (approx. 170 tokens).
- [Experience](/#experience): Career history, contract roles, and representative impact (approx. 340 tokens).
- [Education](/#education): Formal education and academic background (approx. 50 tokens).
- [Gists](https://gist.github.com/dennislo/public): Public GitHub Gists and code snippets (external; token cost varies).
